title: RegenMeetUp — Greenpill Brasil at Fabulosa Lab
dek: A public Luma source backs a Greenpill Brasil RegenMeetUp in Rio de Janeiro with open-space and coordination themes.
excerpt: Greenpill Brasil's RegenMeetUp gives the chapter a public local-events seed story.
body:
This event source can support local-events cards and chapter activity strips.

The story should avoid invented attendance, impact, or follow-on metrics until steward-reviewed sources are added.

## Sources

- S021: https://luma.com/qm4tiq1e
author: Greenpill Network research
